chatter: From imperfection, we build a new world.
A Vishkar architech always completes her task to perfection.
Heed the plan. Divergence leads to defeat.
I will create pathways to victory. Make sure you follow them.
I will see this task completed.
The world is a dream not yet realized.
*sigh* This is such a misuse of my technology.
Violence is such a waste of resources. But they've left us no choice.
With each mission, my techniques grow more optimized.
Unpredictable allies are still allies... barely. (with at least 2 of the following criminal/vigilante heroes on the team: Junker Queen , Junkrat , Roadhog , Sombra or Wrecking Ball )
Let's not dawdle.
Our work begins.
Time to set our plan in motion.
If we continue upon this path, victory will be ours.
Let us continue on this path.
Let us continue on this trajectory.
We are well on our way to victory.
Victory is not beyond our reach.
We must not fail in our efforts. Let us work in harmony.
We still have time to correct our mistakes.
If we work in harmony, we will surely be victorious.
Only we can manifest our victory.
This is the critical moment. We must construct a path to victory.
Victory will be decided here. That reality is ours to shape.
A chance to act on my observations.
A chance to iterate is always appreciated.
A momentary lapse.
Chaos will not be unseated in a day.
Death is an illusion.
I finish my projects.
I will not lose focus.
Hm. Perfection was not the point.
New revelations have come to light.
No path is completely certain.
The way is still open for me.
There is always more to learn.
With each failure comes new perspective.
Hmpfh. My plan was going so smoothly... (eliminated with a Kill Streak)
Touché, Niran. (eliminated by Lifeweaver )
That brute will not best me again. (eliminated by Mauga )
My reinforcements are on the way.
The team is still recovering.
They are taking their time to return...
I am restored.
Much better.
*relieved sigh*
An exceptional performance.
Behold my exceptionality.
Evidence of my success.
I am outstanding!
Excellent.
Iterate, iterate, iterate.
This will be useful.
Delightful.
My reality, my solutions.
This is what I'm capable of.
We are in harmony.
My condition is improved.
Wonderful.
My power grows.
Our fates are entwined.
System optimized.
Perfect alignment.
Damn!
A second chance.
Enemy revived! *sigh* We did not plan for that.
They are being revived! Disrupting our operations...
call-outs: If we work in unison, our defense will be impenetrable.
Their deadline approaches. We will stand in their way!
Their time is running short. Combine your efforts!
They are running out of time. Maintain your place!
Hurry! We must not be defeated here.
There is little time left. Maximize your efforts!
Time grows short, but we will fight to the end!
We are running out of time! Do not lose focus!
eliminations: All according to plan.
An expression of reality.
An unsightly mistake.
Enlightening.
I see you have not found clarity.
I sense an absence of determination.
I will see my ideals through.
Imperfection dematerialized.
One step closer to perfection.
Perfect alignment.
Reflect on your flaws.
Someday, violence will be unnecessary.
There is no place for you in my reality.
Use your imagination.
Was that an attempt at strategy?
Why do you struggle against your fate?
You are disillusioned.
You move so predictably.
You must be living in your own world.
Your presence will not be missed.
Lacking in form, lacking in function. (eliminating Bastion )
Just testing our technology. It works. (eliminating Domina )
Your design is flawed. (eliminating Domina )
You will never understand. (eliminating Doomfist )
You are a fool to believe in your actions. (eliminating Doomfist or Ramattra )
I thought we had more in common. (eliminating Hanzo )
Order conquers anarchy, as usual. (eliminating Hazard )
Finally, I can hear myself think. (eliminating Junkrat , Lúcio or Reinhardt )
*sigh* Stop your racket. (eliminating Junkrat , Lúcio or Reinhardt )
The result of stepping out of line. (eliminating Kiriko )
As always, you lack perspective. (eliminating Lúcio )
*sigh* A waste of a masterful architech. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
*sigh* Ever the thorn in my side. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
I am sorry it came to this, Niran. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
That was from a class you missed. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
You went astray, my friend. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
Chaos and cruelty... a terrible combination. (eliminating Mauga )
Ice fractures beautifully. (eliminating Mei or frozen enemy)
Brilliance wasted on chaos. (eliminating Moira )
Your vision is delusional. (eliminating Ramattra )
*sigh* Put on some shoes. Please... (eliminating Sigma )
Such dissonance of the mind. (eliminating Sigma )
There can only be one true reality. (eliminating enemy Symmetra )
Look towards the future. (eliminating Venture )
Not so graceful anymore. (eliminating Widowmaker )
Your mentality remains trapped in that bubble. (eliminating Zarya )
Forgive me, Tekhartha. (eliminating Zenyatta )
A constructive use of space.
Another accurate prediction.
Quite an effective placement.
Such a lack of awareness.
What efficient defenses.
Watch your surroundings.
You should watch where you're going.
You walk the wrong path.
Perhaps you should think before you act. (eliminating an enemy using movement-based ability)
My technology cares not for intervening distance. (long-range elimination)
Precision always defeats brute force. (eliminating enemy during their ultimate)
This moment is mine. (eliminating enemy during their ultimate)
Spatial awareness. (eliminating enemy using movement ability)
What imprecise movements. (eliminating enemy using movement ability)
Ironclad technology... how archaic. (eliminating Brigitte or Torbjörn using ultimate)
A noble attempt, Niran. (eliminating enemy Life Gripped by Lifeweaver )
You broadcast your intentions so clearly. (eliminating Pharah using Rocket Barrage)
I see you now. (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
A motif in the making.
A new pattern emerges.
Certainty and precision.
I impress myself.
Reality favors repetition.
The balance shifts in my favor.
Balance returns.
Finally, some peace and quiet.
Order restored. If, just for a moment.
Did you think I would forget?
I had not forgotten you.
It was simply what you deserved.
Be careful.
I am looking out for you.
Watch yourself.
You will not always have a savior.
You are not usually this clumsy. (to Lifeweaver )
Get away.
Out of my space.
You are too close.
Environmental awareness...
I recommend observing your surroundings.
Enemy turret destroyed.
Enemy turret destroyed. An inferior design.
That was a good decision.
That was quite admirable.
* sigh * Your competence is refreshing.
Your efforts are paying off.
What an interesting application of living light. (to Lifeweaver )
interactions: Symmetra : A peaceful reality is within our reach. Ana : I wish I could believe that.

Symmetra : I recognize a dancer's posture when I see it. Anran : Same! What style did you study? Symmetra : Kathak. As a child, performing such movements calmed me. Anran : Oh. I think training in classical Chinese dances gave me anxiety.
Ashe : Your company likes makin' headlines. Symmetra : Yes. A natural byproduct of repairing a chaotic world. Ashe : Hmpfh, seems more like a tactic to line their pockets... but what do I know?
D.Va : I heard you're a good dancer. You should try to beat my high score in Dance Floor. Symmetra : Have you checked the scoreboard recently? D.Va : * gasps * You didn't...!

Domina : I've another meeting in Rio de Janeiro, soon. I insist you accompany me. Symmetra : Oh? Will it require another reconstruction? Domina : No, no, Vaswani, that's all been reassigned. The investors simply find your work, uh... "inspiring", for whatever reason.
Echo : When I don't replicate human behaviors, I am misunderstood. Are my algorithms insufficient? Symmetra : You operate on a level inaccessible to others. I do not see that as a weakness.
Symmetra : Why did you leave your organization? Hanzo : I could not bear being the man they'd made of me. Symmetra : How did you know it was the right decision? Hanzo : I didn't.
Symmetra : Your quiver is crooked. Hanzo : Ah. Thank you.

Symmetra : Your pylon is marvelous. Efficient and beautiful. Illari : Doesn't matter how pretty it is if I only use it in ugly situations. Symmetra : I recently learned the phrase, "stop to smell the roses." It applies here, I think.
Junker Queen : What's the biggest axe you could make out of hard light? Symmetra : A kilometer tall? But you would not be able to wield it. Junker Queen : Maybe you wouldn't.
Symmetra : When I look at you, I see pure unadulterated chaos. Junkrat : Is it the bombs? You don't like the bombs?
Kiriko : With a boss like yours, no wonder your company's so exploitative. Symmetra : Not all employees share her valves. Kiriko : Okay. What are yours? Symmetra : They are still a work in progress.
Lifeweaver : Satya, remember our good old days at the academy? Symmetra : You complained constantly about everything, and then you dropped out. Lifeweaver : I saw it as an... early graduation.
Lifeweaver : What do you miss most about the academy, Satya? Symmetra : Your snoring. It helped me sleep.

Lifeweaver : You know, you were the best roommate I've ever had. Symmetra : Your were third-best. The other two went to bed at appropriate times. Lifeweaver : 4 AM is perfectly appropriate if you're working on a great idea!

Lifeweaver : Satya, you must try my latest culinary invention. I call it "The Stoplight"! Symmetra : *sigh* What's in it? Lifeweaver : Mango and pandan jelly blended into a panang curry. Symmetra : I would rather perish.

Lifeweaver : One of the following: Satya, my blossoming spring flower! Light of my life, my reason to live! Satya, my dancing dream, rhythmic ruler of my heart! Satya, my clever little fox, my precious pearl plucked from the depths of the sea! Satya, my radiant moon among the stars, my resonant siren song! Symmetra : *sigh* What, Bua? Lifeweaver : *laughs* What do you mean "what"? I'm just saying hello.

Lifeweaver : Satya... I wanted to apologize. I should have tried harder to contact you. Symmetra : There is no need, Boa. Our separation was Vishkar's fault, alone. Lifeweaver : At least we're backing touch now. We've been better together. Symmetra : I could not agree more, my friend.

Lifeweaver : Are you sure about returning to Vishkar, Satya? You could always stay at the arcology with me. Symmetra : I may join you one day. But I will uncover more as Vishkar's ally than the enemy.

Symmetra : I am still searching for information on Dr. Bhatt, Niran. Answers are not forthcoming. Lifeweaver : It's an Vishkar's best interest to bury it's founder's vision. But you deserve to know the truth.

Lúcio : Did your bosses ever rebuild that favela? You know, the one that mysteriously burned down? Symmetra : I am told it is on the backlog. Lúcio : Funny how that sort of project always gets... deprioritized.

Symmetra : I've been listening to your new music. Lúcio : Why? Is Vishkar doing research on me or something? Symmetra : No. I am intrigued by how the sound moves behind my eyes when I listen. Lúcio : Oh, that's because it's binaural! Uh, glad you like it!
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Symmetra : Dragonflies. Such perfect creatures. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Symmetra: I may have another opportunity to travel to Rio de Janeiro. Do you have any feedback for the board? Lúcio: Yeah, I do. Stay out of my city.
Mauga : So you're a dancer, huh? I enjoy it myself. Symmetra : That is something of a surprise. What style do you prefer? Mauga : Oh, I make other people dance. With my bullets.
Symmetra : Vishkar is offering a large sum for your arrest. Mauga : And what, they sent you to intimidate me?
Mei : Do you ever make snowflakes with your light? Symmetra : Regularly. Their repetitive patterns bring peace to my mind. Mei : Great! We can build a snow fortress!
Symmetra : I can't imagine that you're here to do research. Why are you fighting? Mei : I'm here to make a difference in the world. Just like you, right?
Symmetra: Your invasion has left millions in disarray. Ramattra: Harsh words, considering that your corporation benefits at their expense. You're welcome, by the way.

Sigma : Your work is to be admired! Form and function, working in harmony... Symmetra : Form is vital to function. The two are inseparable, like movement and music. Sigma : Ah, well... perhaps I will take your word for it.
Sojourn : I saw Vishkar is opening an office in Toronto. Symmetra : Yes... Are you interested in applying? Sojourn : *chuckle* I'd rather clean cattle pens in Alberta.
Symmetra : Vigilantes have no place in the world we're building. Soldier: 76 : And Vishkar has no place in mine.
Soldier: 76 : I was just in the kitchen. Anyone have something they wanna confess? Symmetra : It is not my fault your kitchenware melts so easily. Soldier: 76 : * tired sigh *
Symmetra : What more do you know about LumériCo and Vishkar ? Sombra : Ooh...is the little birdie finally leaving her cage? Symmetra : Do not jump to conclusions.
Symmetra : I am impressed. I would not think such crude creations actually function. Torbjörn : Why, thank you! I must admit I'm surprised--hey!
Symmetra : You often call your inventions beautiful. Torbjörn : And they are. Symmetra : It seems beauty is in the eye of the beholder.

Tracer : Think you could spiff up my chronal accelerator with hard light? Symmetra : Potentially. Are you envisioning something in particular? Tracer : How about... a falcon that flaps its wings when I run? Maybe... a plane that does a barrel roll when I dodge? What about... a record that spins when I recall? Symmetra : That is doable. I will send you a quote.
Symmetra : You smell strongly of artificial coconut. Winston : Do you like it? Lena got me a six pack of 'Coco Island' shampoo. I used the whole bottle! Symmetra : Ew. That is excessive.
Symmetra : * sniffs * Something smells foul. Is it you, rodent? Wrecking Ball : Exhaust port fan power increased by 600%.

Symmetra : Your grapple looks rather thin. How much weight can it bear? Wrecking Ball : One mech, two hamsters. Symmetra : Oh, is there seating for another in there? Wrecking Ball : No. The mammal eats a lot .
Symmetra : With a few optimizations, that weapon of yours could probably be much lighter. Zarya : But then it would not be so good for smashing faces.

Zarya : Vaswani. My boss, Katya , has been... difficult, lately. What do you advise? Symmetra : Always say what you believe. If they're not willing to listen, they don't deserve your time. Zarya : *thoughtful grunt*
Symmetra : I admire your discipline. It is a rare quality in the world. Zarya : Not that rare. Some people look strong. Some are strong inside. Symmetra : And you are both? Zarya : Yes, I am both.
Symmetra : It is good to see you again, Tekhartha. Zenyatta : Likewise, Satya. I hope to repay you for your generosity at our temple. Symmetra : With the wisdom you've shared... you already have.
Symmetra : I wonder if I have changed for the better or worse. Zenyatta : Change often comes uninvited. What you make of it is up to you.
map-specific: This will be an evening to remember.
The night can still be ours. (respawn)
Everything by my design. Drawing triangles, tracing lines. It's unwise to disrespect, such an efficient architect.
Hopefully, by now you see, the result of my reality. Everything according to plan. Move your feet, move your hands.
Turrets here, turrets there. Placing turrets everywhere. My teleporter is online; perhaps it's best if you resign.
Gambling is inane. Only a fool believes in luck.
No city in the world can compare to Utopaea .
I admire the hard-light sculptures in this city. There are wonderful artists here.
I cannot imagine living here, movie stars or no.
*Disgust* I wish I could disable my sense of smell.
Vishkar's actions here were... disappointing. I still need answers for them.
